overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a brown coat exploring a foggy gothic graveyard at night. The character walks along dirt and stone paths, passes through ornate iron gates, and encounters translucent ghostly figures among tombstones and ancient stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path leading to gothic graveyard entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the hillside dirt path toward the illuminated stone stairs and iron gate

entered.detail: winding dirt trail leading up the hillside
ancient stone wall with lit lanterns on pillars
tall wooden post with warm glowing light
distant gothic castle spires visible against night sky
wide stone staircase leading up to entrance
ornate black iron gate between stone pillars
massive stone gateposts with lantern tops

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through grassy hills at night, approaching a gothic graveyard entrance marked by stone stairs and an ornate iron gate. Warm lamplight illuminates the stone walls lining the path while distant castle spires are visible against the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty graveyard interior with scattered tombstones and stone structures

events.description: passes through the iron gate into the graveyard interior
begins ascending stone stairs within the graveyard grounds

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate and exploring the graveyard interior, ascending stone stairs while observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure standing motionless near the path ahead
ghostly figure sitting on the roof of a stone mausoleum

entered.detail: scattered ancient grave markers and headstones
small stone building with gothic architecture
interior stone wall lining the graveyard path

segments.scene_description: The character enters the graveyard through the iron gate and walks among tombstones and stone structures. Ghostly figures appear in the distance—one standing on the path ahead and another sitting atop a mausoleum roof. The character continues ascending stone stairs deeper into the misty grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open graveyard with stone monuments and exit gate visible

events.description: passes stone bench on the right side of the path
approaches translucent ghost standing directly in the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open graveyard area, passing stone monuments and approaching ghostly figures

notable_agents.action: translucent ghost in white robes standing in the path facing the character
ghostly figure hovering near tombstones beside the path

entered.detail: stone memorial bench beside the path
exit gate at the far end of the graveyard

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open central area of the graveyard, walking on stone paving past a stone bench and tall monuments. Multiple translucent ghosts stand among the tombstones—one directly in the path and others scattered throughout. The exit gate becomes visible in the distance as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path leading from graveyard toward village

events.description: exits the graveyard through the iron gate into open countryside
village buildings with lit windows become visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking away from the graveyard toward the village, passing another pedestrian on the path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: cluster of village houses with illuminated windows
stone wall marking the graveyard boundary

segments.scene_description: The character exits the graveyard through the iron gate and continues along a dirt path through open countryside. Village buildings with warm lights appear on the left, and another pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The path leads toward distant castle ruins visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit countryside path into a haunted gothic graveyard and back out into the open night. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through grassy hills, guided by warm lamplight toward an ornate iron gate and stone stairs beneath distant castle spires. As the character passes through the gate, the environment shifts into a misty cemetery where translucent ghostly figures appear atop mausoleums and along the path. The scene then expands into a central plaza of stone paving and tall monuments, weaving past several ghosts before the camera tracks the character toward a distant exit. Finally, the camera follows the character back through the iron gates and onto a rural path, passing warm village lights and another pedestrian while heading toward distant castle ruins.
